title: Add error when pass net to function argument (#4132)
body:
Trying to fix issue [#4132 ](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/4132).

Using the following example:
```sv
module top (
	input logic in,
	output wire out
);
	function void set (output set_out, input set_in);
		set_out = 1;
	endfunction

	always_comb begin : setCall
		set(out, in);
	end
endmodule
```

Results:
```sh
$ verilator -cc --binary -j 8 top.sv
%Error-PROCASSWIRE: top.sv:10:7: Passed wire on output or inout subroutine argument, expected expression that is valid on the left hand side of a procedur
al assignment (IEEE 1800-2023 13.5): 'out'
                               : ... note: In instance 'top'
   10 |   set(out, in);
      |       ^~~
                    ... For error description see https://verilator.org/warn/PROCASSWIRE?v=5.023
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```
